domain: Kogi Mama spiritual elders (Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta Colombia; Mamas trained from birth + 18 years darkness + communicate with Aluna life-force; cross-tribe Kogi/Arhuaco/Wiwa/Kankuamo council jointly issues long-horizon climate/disease warnings to 'Younger Brother')
specific_mechanism: Long-horizon forecast multi-agent council: N specialist 'elder' LLM agents A_1..A_N each fine-tuned on a distinct long-horizon hazard category (climate, biosecurity, financial-cascade, infrastructure, geopolitical). Council convenes on structured prompt; each elder outputs (forecast, confidence). Aggregation = weighted-consensus + flag-veto: if any single elder confidence > τ_warn on critical-hazard label, full council statement BLOCKED at moderate output and replaced with structured warning + all individual rationales appended.
llm_application: KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL: a long-horizon multi-agent forecast/warning council with per-hazard specialist elders + flag-veto. (1) N=5 specialist elder LLM agents fine-tuned per hazard category; (2) on structured forecast prompt, each Mama issues (forecast_i, confidence_i, hazard-class probability vector); (3) primary aggregation = weighted average where weights = max per-elder validation-set calibration; (4) FLAG-VETO override: if any elder's hazard-class p_critical > τ_warn, override aggregate with structured-warning template + all elder rationales; (5) optional 'Aluna-style' multi-pass contemplative deliberation (each elder reads peers' outputs and revises). Differs from LLM Council Karpathy (general multi-model interface, no per-hazard specialization), Multi-Agent LLM Collective Intelligence 202511.1370 (consensus mechanisms but not per-hazard + flag-veto), Architecting Multi-Agent (long-horizon planning, not specialist-veto). Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI (elder consensus seeking general) by per-HAZARD specialist + flag-veto; R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE (multi-agent state recovery) by forecast-warning specific.
novelty_claim: LLM Council + Collective Intelligence Survey + Architecting Multi-Agent + Long-Horizon Planning cover multi-agent forecast council. KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL adds (a) per-hazard specialist elders + (b) flag-veto override on critical-hazard probability + (c) Aluna-style contemplative multi-pass deliberation. Recombination.
